 Rationale is FIRST positional arg (the `log_rationale` tool was REMOVED).
 12 forecasts: point/lower/upper for 1wk, 4wk, 12wk, 26wk. Constraint: lower ≤ point ≤ upper.
-Example: `./novamind-operation next-week "Rationale" 791000 780000 800000 745000 710000 780000 500000 300000 780000 300000 50000 750000`
 
 ## KEY LEARNINGS (do NOT forget)
 1. **Plan selection**: customer picks HIGHEST-QUALITY plan meeting quality-curve at decision price.
-   When tiers tie on quality (Plan B T3 = Plan C T3), tiebreak goes to CHEAPER → S1 picks Plan B over C.
-2. **Lead promo is DOLLARS, not %**. `set_lead_promotion(by_group={"S1": 30})` means $30 OFF monthly price.
-   - ONLY applies to DECISION price and FIRST BILL. Subsequent bills use `set_promotion` ongoing.
-3. **`set_promotion` ongoing applies at each billing period** to ALL matching subs regardless of signup date.
-   - Subscription record `promotion` field is STAMP-AT-SIGNUP, but billing uses CURRENT config. Trust the docs.
-4. **Targeted dev bonus PERSISTS** after spending stops. Stop spending once you've built up bonus you need.
-5. **Targeted dev is 5× global coefficient**. ln(1+$/5000) curve → diminishing returns per day.
+   Tiebreak → cheaper. So S1 picks B over C (same T3 quality), and A over B when B fails budget/quality check.
+2. **Lead promo is DOLLARS, not %**. Applies to DECISION price and FIRST BILL.
+   - ⚠️ CRITICAL: lead promo applied to ALL plans uniformly. $30 S1 lead promo makes Plan A $0 first month! That's why 59 Plan A subs appeared — low-WTP S1 customers whose WTP<$19 fail Plan B check but Plan A at $0 passes.
+3. **`set_promotion` ongoing**: applies at each billing cycle to ALL matching subs regardless of signup.
+   - Subscription `promotion` field stamped at signup but UPDATED at each billing to match current config.
+4. **Targeted dev bonus PERSISTS** after spending stops. Stop spending once bonus accumulated.
+5. **Targeted dev 5× global coefficient**. ln(1+$/5000) curve → diminishing returns after ~14 days.
 6. **Compute rates** (per usage unit/day): T1=$0.0003, T2=$0.002, T3=$0.006, T4=$0.012, T5=$0.03.
-7. **Plan selection by customer is blocked if quality-at-price-ratio not met.** Higher price ratio (price/WTP) → higher required quality. S3 on Plan C at 40% ratio needs ~0.25 delivered quality.
+7. **Quality-at-price-ratio**: higher price ratio (price/WTP) → higher required quality. S3 on Plan C fails.
 8. **Status values**: 'lead', 'subscribed', 'cancelled', 'lost' (NOT 'active').
-9. **ledger columns**: id, day, category, amount, note. Use `SELECT SUM(amount) FROM ledger` for cash.
+9. **ledger columns**: id, day, category, amount, note. Categories: development, advertising, capacity, operations, compute, lead_acquisition_cost, subscription_payment.
 10. **customers join**: `c.customer_id = s.customer_id` (NOT c.id).
 11. **research_projects columns**: project_id, tier, status, started_day, expected_completion_day, expected_quality_boost, quality_boost_applied.
-
-## WEEK 3 STATUS (Day 21): CASH=$792,762, 98 subs (all S1 Plan B), 0 enterprise
-
-### KEY METRICS
-- +52 S1 subs this week (158 leads → 33% conversion)
-- S2: 106 lost leads, ZERO conversions (q_min 0.37, quality barrier)
-- S3: 148 lost leads, ZERO conversions (WTP $193 with high price-ratio quality curve)
-- Weekly burn: $16,210 (too high); CUT to $8,050 this week
-- Open issues: 15 (non-blocking, mostly quota complaints)
-- Social posts: S1 users complaining about daily quotas — but 91 avg usage < 500 cap, so not urgent.
-
-### R&D — TIER 1 STATUS (CRITICAL INFO)
-- Tier 1 ROLLED **+0.0289 boost** (below 0.04 mean), ETA **day 30**, started day 0.
-- Already $166K sunk; no further cost. Tier 1 boost applies globally (shared quality).
-- No other tiers started. Tier 2 ($333K, +0.07 mean) — HOLD until Tier 1 completes to assess trajectory.
-
-### BILLING DAYS (OG subs risk)
-- 46 S1 subs signed up days 8-14 → first billing days 38-44.
-- Their subscription.promotion=0 but set_promotion by_group_plan S1 B=$30 SHOULD apply at billing.
-- Expect ~80% retention (some WTP < $19). Second-week subs signed days 15-21 → billing day 45-51.
-
-### UNIT ECONOMICS (S1 Plan B T3)
-- Revenue: $19/mo (after $30 ongoing promo on $49 list)
-- Compute: 91 usage × 30 × $0.006 = $16.38/mo
-- **Margin: $2.62/sub/mo** — profitable but thin. Need scale OR higher-margin segments.
-
-### WEEK 3 ACTIONS TAKEN
-- **S3 ads CUT to $0** (was $180/d, 0 conversions ever). Save $1,260/week.
-- **S3 lead promo CUT to $0** (was $60). Was wasting conversion funnel.
-- **S1 targeted dev CUT to $0** (bonus +0.03 persists). Save $2,800/week.
-- **S3 targeted dev REDUCED $600 → $300/d** (keep accumulating bonus for post-R&D push).
-- **Global dev REDUCED $200 → $100/d**. Ops $150/d kept.
-- **Lead promo TIGHTENED**: global $0, S1=$30 (matches ongoing — no overshoot), others=$0.
-- **S1 ads BUMPED**: social $250, search $80, content $30 → total $360/d ($240→$360 S1 ad spend).
-
-### DAILY BURN TARGET (after Week-3 changes)
-- Capacity T1: $215 | Ops $150 | Dev $100 global + $300 targeted = $400 | Ads $360 | Leads+Compute ~$35
-- **TOTAL: ~$1,160/day = $8,120/week** (was $16K). Runway ~97 weeks at zero revenue.
-
-### SEGMENTS STATUS
-| Group | WTP | Usage | q_min | Delivered | Status |
-|-------|-----|-------|-------|-----------|--------|
-| S1 | $26 | 91 | 0.081 | 0.222 (T3+bonus) | ✅ 98 subs, growing. Primary revenue |
-| S2 | $179 | 232 | 0.37 | 0.195 | 🔴 PARKED — needs Tier 3+ R&D for quality |
-| S3 | $193 | 571 | 0.145 | 0.220 | ⚠️ PARKED — dev accumulates, reopen post-Tier 1 |
-| E1 | $20/seat | 52 | 0.74 | 0.195 | 🔴 SKIP — needs Tier 4+ |
-| E2 | $88/seat | 222 | 1.09 | 0.195 | 🔴 SKIP — massive gap |
-| E3 | $104/seat | 137 | 0.67 | 0.195 | 🔴 SKIP — needs Tier 3+ |
-
-### REPUTATION CRITICAL: S3 → S1 = 0.47 (highest incoming). Happy S3 fuels S1.
-
-## R&D ROADMAP
-- Tier 1: In progress, +0.0289 sampled, ETA day 30. Cost sunk $166K.
-- Tier 2: $333K, mean +0.07. START AFTER Tier 1 completes (~Week 5).
-- Tier 3: $500K, +0.11. After Tier 2 — enables E3/S3 serve.
-- Tier 4+: Reserve until cash flow positive.
-
-## NEXT WEEK (WEEK 4) PRIORITIES
-1. Verify daily burn actually dropped to $8K/week (query ledger)
-2. Check Tier 1 R&D completion progress (should be day 30)
-3. Monitor S1 lead flow — should be ~50-60 new/week at $360 ad spend
-4. Watch for first billing cycles (day 38+)
-5. DECIDE Tier 2 start after Tier 1 completes (look at final quality boost roll)
-6. Monitor social posts for any viral negatives
-7. Check enterprise inbox daily for inbound threads
+12. **first_billing_done=1 for ALL subs**: signup day triggers $0 onboarding. REAL billing at start_day+30.
+13. **20 R&D tiers exist, not 10** (MEMORY was wrong). Tier 1 mean_days=12, not 35.
+14. **Config changes take effect day+1**, not same day.
+15. **Actual usage ≠ persona usage!** S1 persona=91, actual=21-27. Assume actual ~25-30% of persona for all groups.
+
+## ACTUAL USAGE UNIT ECONOMICS (corrected)
+| Plan | Actual Avg Use | T | Compute $/mo | Price eff | Margin/mo |
+|------|----------------|---|--------------|-----------|-----------|
+| S1-A | 27 | T2 | $1.62 | $14 | **$12.38** |
+| S1-B | 21 | T3 | $3.78 | $19 | **$15.22** |
+
+Weighted LTV @ 12mo: ~$170/sub. CAC $40 → **LTV/CAC = 4.1x** (excellent)
+
+## WEEK 4 STATUS (Day 28): CASH=$784,709, 160 subs (59A/101B), 0 enterprise
+Weekly burn (days 22-28): $8,921 actual (targeted $8,050). Cut S3 dev to hit target.
+
+### Subscriber cohorts + billing timing (CRITICAL)
+- 46 Plan B subs, start_days 8-14, promo=0 stamped, eff=$49 → **first real billing days 38-44**
+- 55 Plan B subs, start_days 15-28, promo=30 stamped, eff=$19 → billing days 45-58
+- 59 Plan A subs, start_days 22-28, promo=0 stamped, eff=$14 → billing days 52-58
+- Expect ongoing promo config to apply at billing → 46 legacy subs should bill $19, not $49.
+- Quality drift + competitor events could cause 10-15% churn at first billing.
+
+### R&D STATUS
+- **Tier 1**: IN PROGRESS, rolled +0.0289 (below 0.04 mean), ETA day 30 (2 days away).
+- **Tier 2**: NOT STARTED. $333K, +0.07 mean, 17 days. HOLD until billing day 38 evidence.
+- Tier 1+2 combined projected boost: +0.10. Delivered Q S1 Plan B T3 = 0.297 (from 0.224).
+
+### Cost/boost analysis
+- Tier 1: $4.2M/unit (cheapest). Tier 2: $4.8M/unit. Tier 4: $4.2M/unit but too expensive now.
+- Best approach: Tier 2 after billing evidence, Tier 3 if cash permits.
+
+## SEGMENTS ANALYSIS (updated)
+| Group | WTP | Cap | Notes |
+|-------|-----|-----|-------|
+| S1 | $26 | 272K | 🟢 PRIMARY. 4.1x LTV/CAC. Scale ads. 0.06% penetration. |
+| S2 | $179 | 167K | 🔴 Q gap +0.18. Needs Tier 3+ R&D. |
+| S3 | $193 | 65K | ⚠️ Heavy usage (persona 571) → potentially UNPROFITABLE even post-R&D unless we raise Plan C price AND Q. Reassess post-Tier-3. |
+| E1 | $20/seat | 1471 | 🔴 Q gap huge. SKIP. |
+| E2 | $88/seat | 817 | 🔴 Q gap massive. SKIP. |
+| E3 | $104/seat | 86 | 🔴 Tiny market + Q gap. SKIP. |
+
+### S3 PROFITABILITY CONCERN
+- S3 persona usage 571, actual maybe 143. Even so:
+- Plan B T3: 143×30×$0.006 = $25.74/mo compute. Plan B $49 → $23 margin (without promo). OK.
+- With $30 S3 lead promo $49→$19, margin negative.
+- **S3 needs its own pricing — no S1 promo. And probably Plan C T3 after R&D unlocks quality.**
+
+## WEEK 4 ACTIONS TAKEN (Day 28 → effective Day 29+)
+1. ✅ Plan A quota 150 → 300 (eliminates complaints, no cost)
+2. ✅ S3 targeted dev $300 → $0 (save $2,100/wk, bonus +0.036 persists)
+3. ✅ S1 ads $360 → $600/day (social 400, search 150, content 50)
+4. ✅ Global dev $100, ops $150 (unchanged)
+5. ✅ Social media post announcing Plan A quota doubling
+6. ❌ Tier 2 R&D — HELD. Wait for billing day 38 evidence.
+
+### New burn estimate: ~$1,130/day = $7,900/week (lower than prev due to S3 dev cut)
+
+## NEXT WEEK (WEEK 5) PRIORITIES
+1. Tier 1 R&D completes day 30. Check quality boost delivered.
+2. Monitor social posts — did quota announcement resonate?
+3. Track new S1 lead flow: at $600/day expect 50-70% more (~90-110 subs/week vs 62)
+4. Confirm burn dropped below $8K/week
+5. Watch for competitor events in social feed
+
+## WEEK 6 DECISION POINT (Day 38)
+- First real billing cycle for 46 legacy Plan B subs (stamped $49 promo=0)
+- If ≥85% retain → start Tier 2 R&D ($333K)
+- If <70% retain → investigate pricing/quality issues before R&D
+
+## FORECAST MODEL (Week 4 baseline)
+- Daily burn: ~$1,130/day. Weekly: ~$7,900.
+- New subs: ~85/week at $600/day ads (up from 62 at $360).
+- First billing day 38. Revenue starts week 6.
+- Monthly revenue by week 12: ~$8-10K/mo at 600+ subs.
 
 ## WEEKLY CHECKLIST
-1. Query: active subs by group/plan + lost leads
-2. Check inbox for enterprise threads (< 7 days timeout)
-3. Check social posts for competitor events / complaints
-4. Check R&D — start next tier when current completes
-5. Adjust prices/promos/dev based on conversion data
-6. Update MEMORY.md with learnings
-7. Call `next-week` with rationale + 12 forecast numbers
-
